public_practice_name: North Shore Center of Dental Health
notes: Vendor hint (smilesforyou.com) confirmed correct: address (9350 Waukegan Rd, Morton Grove, IL 60053) and phone (847-470-0850) match exactly on the site's own location page. Site is branded 'Smiles For You' with per-location subpages (URL pattern /about-us/location/morton-grove/969), suggesting the brand serves multiple Chicago-area locations, though no other locations were confirmed within budget. No careers page found.

Record's phone (847) 663-1422 does NOT belong to 'Dental Clinic of Morton Grove.' That practice is at 5901 W Dempster St, Suite 201, Morton Grove IL 60053 with phone (847) 663-1196 (confirmed on dentalclinicofmortongrove.com, no doctor names listed there). The record's phone (847) 663-1422 instead belongs to a DIFFERENT practice, Ted J. Heinz, DDS, located at 5901 Dempster St, Suite 202 (same building, different suite), confirmed on tedheinz.com. Successor/mismatch per Rule 2 -- flagging both entities.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Wajih Chammae is the dentist currently profiled at this Avid Dental location (the record's named entity 'Aliaj, Fatjona DMD' now practices elsewhere)
notes: Record's address (1740 W Algonquin Rd, Mt Prospect, IL 60056) and phone (847-439-6332) are corroborated as belonging to 'Avid Dental,' matching the vendor hint domain (aviddental.net), but that practice is now fronted by Dr. Wajih Chammae per aviddental.net/about-us/dr-wajih-chammae. The record's named provider, Dr. Fatjona Aliaj, DMD, now practices at The Dental Store, 1061 South Roselle Rd, Schaumburg, IL -- a different address/practice entirely, with no connection to Avid Dental or this address found. Aliaj appears to have left/sold this location -- successor/mismatch per Rule 2.
